creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
(In reply to Zach Leslie from comment #5)

> I'm not sure what the last comment means.
> No change required for sysutils/puppet4 here.

It means that since the maintainer e-mail address registered for the port is not the same as your e-mail address in Bugzilla, the system is unable to automatically request your feedback or approval. As you've given it verbally, and the patch you submitted is syncing up the e-mail address, I'm marking it as maintainer-approved on your behalf.

Please remember to set the maintainer-approval+ flag on attachments for ports you're maintainer of, under attachment Details, to help us track this issue better.
